Package index

All functions

compute_kwon()
Calculate the Kwon index
compute_uncertainty()
Compute uncertainty from membership matrix
compute_xb()
Calculate the XB index
detect_aggregation()
Detect aggregated uncertain locations
detect_boundary()
Detect boundary uncertain locations
fcmclust()
Fuzzy c-means clustering
fcmclust_auto()
Fuzzy c-means clustering with automatic fuzziness parameter selection
plot_aggregation()
Visualize aggregated uncertain locations
plot_boundary()
Visualize boundary uncertain locations
plot_clusters()
Visualize spatial cluster labels
plot_uncertainty()
Visualize uncertainty on spatial coordinates
print(<fcmclust>)
Print an fcmclust object
print(<fcmclust_auto>)
Print an fcmclust_auto object
quest()
Run the QUEST pipeline
